hero.title:
Build Stronger
 Relationships Across
 Every Project With
 BuilderTek CRM
hero.description: BuilderTek CRM Management gives construction teams a single, connected interface for tracking leads and opportunities for project-linked communication. CRM Management Software ensures nothing gets lost as projects move from preconstruction through closeout.

financialControl.title: Construction-Focused CRM Built to Streamline Lead and Prospect Management.
financialControl.description: A smarter way to manage relationships, opportunities, and project communication.
features: BuilderTek extends Salesforce's CRM capabilities with construction-specific workflows.
Give teams complete visibility into every relationship while reducing manual data entry and disconnected communication.

section.title: BuilderTek CRM Tools Designed for Construction Workflows
section.subtitle: Built for construction teams, BuilderTek CRM aligns relationships, opportunities, and project data in one connected workflow.

features.title: Account & Contact Management
features.description: Maintain a centralized database for customers, subcontractors, vendors, and partners—fully connected to projects.

features.title: Lead & Opportunity Tracking
features.description: Manage leads and opportunities from first contact through contract award with full visibility into sales pipelines.

features.title: Project-Connected Communication
features.description: Link emails, notes, and activity history directly to accounts, opportunities, and projects.

features.title: Automated Follow-Ups & Tasks
features.description: Create reminders and task workflows to ensure timely communication and consistent outreach.

features.title: Cross-Team Visibility
features.description: Sales, operations, and project teams all work from the same CRM data.

features.title: Sales-to-Project Conversion
features.description: Seamlessly convert awarded opportunities into active projects from preconstruction to execution without re-entering data.

section.title:
Stronger Relationships
 Better Project Outcomes.
section.description: Unify relationship data, communication, and project context to improve collaboration, streamline handoffs, and deliver more successful construction projects.

cards.title: Improved Relationship Visibility
cards.description: With all communication and data centralized, teams gain a complete understanding of each client and vendor relationship, reducing miscommunication and missed follow-ups.

cards.title: Smoother Handoffs from Sales to Delivery
cards.description: Project teams inherit full context from CRM records, ensuring nothing is lost between opportunity award and project execution.

cards.title: Greater Consistency & Accountability
cards.description: Standardized workflows and activity tracking help teams maintain professionalism and follow-through across every interaction.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: How is BuilderTek CRM different from standard CRM?
items.answer: BuilderTek enhancced a normal CRM with construction-specific workflows and direct links to projects, budgets, and contracts.

items.question: Can sales and project teams use the CRM together?
items.answer: BuilderTek CRM is designed for shared visibility across sales, operations, and project teams.

items.question: Does BuilderTek CRM support vendor and subcontractor management?
items.answer: Yes. Vendors and subcontractors are managed as accounts and contacts connected directly to projects.

items.question: Can emails and communication be tracked in BuilderTek CRM?
items.answer: Yes. Emails, notes, tasks, and follow-ups are logged directly in BuilderTek dashboard for a complete history.

items.question: Does CRM data connect to financial and project workflows?
items.answer: BuilderTek CRM records link seamlessly to quotes, contracts, budgets, and projects for full lifecycle continuity.
